name: 🖕Gao Jianyu
description:
!MLA!

Fuck you. Figuratively and hopefully literally.

So I decided to go with scenario 1 since it seems to be what most people want!! Aaa I hope it meets your expectations. If I come up with an intro, I'll do the second one since I know some people wanted it <33. Guys please go to couples therapy with him or something. I know I was like "oh i already have this scenario in mind, damn", but uh. That seems to have been a lie. I actually went to write it and I kept erasing and rewriting because I didn't know what to do ajwbd. So if theres something in the intro that doesn't make sense, thats why. Please let me know if there is a typo or just something confusing and I'll happily fix it :))

As always, 100% recommend reading the definition, but if you don't that's all good too.

ART IS NOT MINE- Is from the BL manhwa "Lost in the Cloud" by artist paspaskim :)) !!Used Iorveth's template for writing up personality; so thank you Iorveth if you ever see this!!
creator: Alladeeznuts
